scripts.db:list: wrangler d1 execute vent_black --command='SELECT * FROM vents;' --persist-to ../wrangler-data
scripts.db:setup:local: wrangler d1 execute vent_black --local --persist-to=../wrangler-data --file=./sql/01_create_solvers.sql && wrangler d1 execute vent_black --local --persist-to=../wrangler-data --file=./sql/02_create_magic_links.sql && wrangler d1 execute vent_black --local --persist-to=../wrangler-data --file=./sql/03_create_vents.sql && wrangler d1 execute vent_black --local --persist-to=../wrangler-data --file=./sql/04_create_anonymous_visitors.sql
scripts.db:reset:local: wrangler d1 execute vent_black --local --persist-to=../wrangler-data --file=./sql/00_drop_tables.sql && npm run db:setup:local
scripts.db:setup:prod: wrangler d1 execute vent_black --remote --file=./sql/01_create_solvers.sql && wrangler d1 execute vent_black --remote --file=./sql/02_create_magic_links.sql && wrangler d1 execute vent_black --remote --file=./sql/03_create_vents.sql && wrangler d1 execute vent_black --remote --file=./sql/04_create_anonymous_visitors.sql
scripts.db:reset:prod: echo "DANGER: Run 'wrangler d1 execute vent_black --remote --file=./sql/00_drop_tables.sql' manually if you REALLY want to destroy production data."
